_note: Watchlist of x402-priced endpoints not yet promotable to seed.json. Three reasons an entry lives here: (a) verified to return 402 but on Base Sepolia testnet — needs a Sepolia chain adapter (v0 is mainnet-only). (b) suspected but not yet curl-verified. (c) verified-by-curl but not yet round-tripped with a real payment. The verify-seed CI does NOT check this file. To promote an entry: ensure the gateway supports its chain, do a real payment round-trip, then move the JSON object to seed.json with verified: true. Other leads I noted but couldn't pin down API paths for in 2026-05-09 search: x402.coinstats.app (saw 402 on /coins), api.actiongate.xyz, walletiq-zeta.vercel.app, augurrisk.com, myceliasignal.com, diamondclaws.io. PRs welcome.

entries.name: Pay.sh Debugger — MPP stock quote (sandbox)
entries.description: Solana Foundation × Google Cloud's MPP-protocol debugger. Returns a real 402 with a WWW-Authenticate Payment challenge on Solana localnet (Surfpool sandbox) — useful for shaping/validating an MPP client. Not a real paid endpoint; cannot settle on mainnet.
